rationale: Section 48.271 addresses appraisal appeal adjustments under Tax Code Chapter 42, not homestead exemptions. The proposed exemption increase does not alter the appeal-triggered adjustment mechanism or the five-percent threshold.
quote: If the final determination of an appeal under Chapter 42, Tax Code, results in a reduction in the taxable value of property that exceeds five percent of the total taxable value of property in the school district
_note: No direct conflict; §48.271 is scoped to Chapter 42 appraisal appeals, not to §11.13(b) exemptions.
